primary_entry_signal: 15M bearish engulfing or pin bar rejection closing below $4,570 at the $4,570–$4,590 zone
flip_trigger_condition: Price drops to $4,460–$4,475 channel floor support WITHOUT triggering SHORT first, OR price breaks and closes above $4,610 invalidating the SHORT
flip_entry_signal: 15M bullish engulfing or hammer candle closing above $4,465 at the $4,460–$4,475 support zone
notes: Monday open ~$4,576 — gold sitting inside PRIMARY SHORT zone. Bearish descending channel from April 21 high $4,833 intact, making lower highs and lower lows.
